description_long: This object consists of two identical black game controllers, each featuring a classic ergonomic design with rounded grips and a central button layout. The controllers have two analog sticks, a directional pad, and four prominent face buttons marked with colored symbols, typical of PlayStation-style controllers. Shoulder buttons are visible along the top edge, and the surface finish is matte with a slight sheen. The controllers are compact, with visible seams indicating separate molded plastic parts. The branding and button labels are white, providing contrast against the dark body. These controllers are designed for handheld use and are likely constructed from durable plastic with internal electronic components.
description: A pair of black, ergonomic game controllers with analog sticks, colored face buttons, and shoulder buttons, designed for handheld use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the button layout, analog sticks, and colored face buttons on both controllers.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness, grip contours, and shoulder buttons of the controllers.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the shoulder buttons and the overall flatness of the controller tops.
description_view_3: Angled rear view emphasizing the back contours and the ergonomic shape of the grips.
